arts.ttl: Calafiori transfer sparks legal tensions between Roma, Basel, and Bologna
arts.sum: The summer transfer of Riccardo Calafiori from Bologna to Arsenal has ignited a complex legal dispute involving his former clubs, Roma and Basel. The post Calafiori transfer sparks legal tensions between Roma, Basel, and Bologna appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Thijs Dallinga’s goal drought: Bologna’s €15 million enigma
arts.sum: Gazzetta dello Sport report how Thijs Dallinga's goalless streak at Bologna continues to be a growing concern for the club and its fans. The post Thijs Dallinga’s goal drought: Bologna’s €15 million enigma appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina forward Moise Kean aims to top both scoring and music charts as he releases first album
arts.sum: Fiorentina forward Moise Kean is aiming to top both the scoring charts and the music charts. However, in his three years back at Juventus, Kean totaled just 22 goals and three assists in 123 appearances.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bologna vs. Fiorentina - prediction, team news, lineups
